IndustryData-ReferenceDefinition.Read.Al.description: Allows the app to read reference definitions without a signed-in user.

ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForU.displayName: Read all resource specific permissions granted on user accounts
ResourceSpecificPermissionGrant.ReadForU.description: Allows the app to read all resource specific permissions granted on user accounts, without a signed-in user.

Device.Read.description: Allows the app to read a user's list of devices on behalf of the signed-in user.

TeamSettings.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and change all teams' settings
TeamSettings.ReadWrite.All.description: Read and change all teams' settings, without a signed-in user.

LearningAssignedCourse.Read.description: Allows the app to read data for the learner's assignments in the organization's directory, on behalf of the signed-in user.

Tasks.Read.All.displayName: Read all users' tasks and tasklist
Tasks.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all users' tasks and task lists in your organization, without a signed-in user.

Mail.Send.description: Allows the app to send mail as any user without a signed-in user.

BackupRestore-Configuration.ReadWrite.Al.displayName: Read and edit backup configuration policies
BackupRestore-Configuration.ReadWrite.Al.description: Allows the app to read and update the backup configuration, and list of Microsoft 365 service resources to be backed up, without a signed-in user.

AppCatalog.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read apps in the app catalogs without a signed-in user.

TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForTe.displayName: Manage installation and permission grants of selected Teams apps in all teams
TeamsAppInstallation.ManageSelectedForTe.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall selected Teams apps in any team, without a signed-in user. Gives the ability to manage permission grants for accessing those specific teams' data.

Domain.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all domain properties without a signed-in user.

Mail.Send.Shared.displayName: Send mail on behalf of others
Mail.Send.Shared.description: Allows the app to send mail as the signed-in user, including sending on-behalf of others.

Schedule-WorkingTime.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to trigger the working time policies without a signed-in user.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.description: Allows the app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall Teams apps installed for the signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

AuditLogsQuery-Endpoint.Read.All.displayName: Read audit logs data from Endpoint Data Loss Prevention workload
AuditLogsQuery-Endpoint.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read and query audit logs from Endpoint Data Loss Prevention workload.

RoleManagement.ReadWrite.Defender.description: Allows the app to read the role-based access control (RBAC) settings for your company's directory, without a signed-in user.

Mail.Read.Shared.description: Allows the app to read mail a user can access, including their own and shared mail.

Policy.ReadWrite.SecurityDefaults.displayName: Read and write your organization's security defaults policy
Policy.ReadWrite.SecurityDefaults.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's security defaults policy without a signed-in user.

Notes.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write all OneNote notebooks
Notes.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read all the OneNote notebooks in your organization, without a signed-in user.

VirtualEventRegistration-Anon.ReadWrite..displayName: Read and write anonymous users' virtual event registrations
VirtualEventRegistration-Anon.ReadWrite..description: Allows the app to read and write anonymous users' virtual event registrations, without a signed-in user

WorkforceIntegration.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read workforce integrations, to synchronize data from Microsoft Teams Shifts, on behalf of the signed-in user.

RecordsManagement.Read.All.displayName: Read Records Management configuration, labels and policies
RecordsManagement.Read.All.description: Allows the application to read any data from Records Management, such as configuration, labels, and policies without the signed in user.

UserTeamwork.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read all user teamwork settings without a signed-in user.

User-ConvertToInternal.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Convert an external user to internal member user
User-ConvertToInternal.ReadWrite.All.description: Allow the app to convert an external user to an internal member user, without a signed-in user.

Calendars.ReadBasic.displayName: Read basic details of user calendars
Calendars.ReadBasic.description: Allows the app to read events in user calendars, except for properties such as body, attachments, and extensions.

Member.Read.Hidden.description: Allows the app to read the memberships of hidden groups and administrative units without a signed-in user.

PlaceDevice.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write all workplace devices
PlaceDevice.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write all workplace devices, without a signed-in user.

IdentityRiskyUser.Read.All.displayName: Read all identity risky user information
IdentityRiskyUser.Read.All.description: Allows the app to read the identity risky user information for your organization without a signed in user.

InformationProtectionPolicy.Read.displayName: Read user sensitivity labels and label policies
InformationProtectionPolicy.Read.description: Allows an app to read information protection sensitivity labels and label policy settings, on behalf of the signed-in user.

SpiffeTrustDomain.ReadWrite.All.displayName: Read and write SPIFFE trust domains and child resources
SpiffeTrustDomain.ReadWrite.All.description: Allows the app to read and write your organization's SPIFFE trust domains and child resources without a signed in user.

EduCurricula.Read.description: Allows the app to read the user's modules and resources on behalf of the signed-in user.

TeamsTab.ReadWriteForTeam.displayName: Allow the Teams app to manage all tabs in teams
TeamsTab.ReadWriteForTeam.description: Allows a Teams app to read, install, upgrade, and uninstall all tabs to teams the signed-in user can access.

Files.SelectedOperations.Selected.displayName: Access selected Files without a signed in user.
Files.SelectedOperations.Selected.description: Allow the application to access a subset of files without a signed in user.  The specific files and the permissions granted will be configured in SharePoint Online or OneDrive.

TeamsAppInstallation.ReadSelectedForTeam.displayName: Read selected installed Teams apps in all teams
TeamsAppInstallation.ReadSelectedForTeam.description: Allows the app to read the selected Teams apps that are installed in any team, without a signed-in user. Does not give the ability to read application-specific settings.

ShortNotes.ReadWrite.displayName: Read, create, edit, and delete short notes of the signed-in user
ShortNotes.ReadWrite.description: Allows the app to read, create, edit, and delete short notes of a signed-in user.

VirtualAppointment.ReadWrite.displayName: Read and write a user's virtual appointments
VirtualAppointment.ReadWrite.description: Allows an application to read and write virtual appointments for the signed-in user. Only an organizer or participant user can read and write their virtual appointments.
